Block.Para: An Act to amend the Bank Act and other Acts (cost of borrowing for credit cards)

This bill was introduced during the Second Session of the 40th Parliament. Pursuant to the Standing Orders of the House of Commons, it is deemed to have been considered and approved at all stages completed at the time of prorogation of the Second Session. The number of the bill remains unchanged.

Also available on the Parliament of Canada Web Site at the following address:
http://www.parl.gc.ca

This enactment amends the Bank Act, the Cooperative Credit Associations Act, the Insurance Companies Act and the Trust and Loan Companies Act to set the maximum rate that may be charged for the cost of borrowing in respect of credit cards.

Bill_Part.RunningHead_E: Banks (cost of borrowing for credit cards)

Block.Para: An Act to amend the Bank Act and other Acts (cost of borrowing for credit cards)
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:
1. Section 452 of the Bank Act is amended by adding the following after subsection (2):

Block.MarginalNote: Rate per annum â credit cards

Para.change: (2.1) No bank shall charge the holder of a credit card issued by the bank a rate per annum in respect of the cost of borrowing that exceeds by more than five per cent the current Bank of Canada target for the overnight rate.

Block.Para: 2. Section 570 of the Act is amended by adding the following after subsection (2):

Block.MarginalNote: Rate per annum â credit cards

Para.change: (2.1) No authorized foreign bank shall charge the holder of a credit card issued by the bank a rate per annum in respect of the cost of borrowing that exceeds by more than five per cent the current Bank of Canada target for the overnight rate.

Block.Para: 3. Section 385.18 of the Cooperative Credit Associations Act is amended by adding the following after subsection (3):

Block.MarginalNote: Rate per annum â credit cards

Para.change: (3.1) No retail association shall charge the holder of a credit card issued by the retail association a rate per annum in respect of the cost of borrowing that exceeds by more than five per cent the current Bank of Canada target for the overnight rate.

Block.Para: 4. Section 482 of the Insurance Companies Act is amended by adding the following after subsection (2):

Block.MarginalNote: Rate per annum â credit cards

Para.change: (2.1) No company shall charge the holder of a credit card issued by the company a rate per annum in respect of the cost of borrowing that exceeds by more than five per cent the current Bank of Canada target for the overnight rate.

Block.Para: 5. Section 438 of the Trust and Loan Companies Act is amended by adding the following after subsection (2):

Block.MarginalNote: Rate per annum â credit cards

Para.change: (2.1) No company shall charge the holder of a credit card issued by the company a rate per annum in respect of the cost of borrowing that exceeds by more than five per cent the current Bank of Canada target for the overnight rate.

Block.Para:
Published under authority of the Speaker of the House of Commons
